Title: Star Voyager
Plot: A lone astronaut discovers a sentient planet that communicates through mathematical equations, leading to a galaxy-altering discovery.

Title: Mystery on the Nile
Plot: A brilliant detective must solve a murder on a luxury cruise ship, where every passenger has a motive and a secret.

Title: The Last Recipe
Plot: An aging chef with a failing restaurant tries to recreate a legendary lost recipe to save his family's legacy and reconnect with his estranged daughter.

Title: Echoes of the Past
Plot: A historian uncovers a hidden diary that reveals a conspiracy dating back centuries, putting her in the crosshairs of a secret society.

Title: Jester's Gambit
Plot: A clumsy court jester accidentally overhears a plot to overthrow the king and must use his wits and pratfalls to save the kingdom without anyone realizing he's a hero.

Title: Galactic Gladiators
Plot: In a dystopian future, a disgraced soldier is forced to compete in a deadly televised tournament on a distant planet, fighting for his freedom.

Title: The Quantum Thief
Plot: A master thief uses a device that allows her to jump between parallel universes to steal priceless artifacts, but her latest heist attracts the attention of inter-dimensional police.

Title: Sunrise Inn
Plot: Two rival hotel owners in a small coastal town are forced to work together to host a massive wedding, finding love and common ground along the way.

Title: Beneath the Ice
Plot: A research team in Antarctica drills into a subterranean lake and unleashes a prehistoric organism that hunts them one by one in the claustrophobic confines of their base.

Title: Chronos Rebellion
Plot: A group of rebels uses illegal time-travel technology to try and prevent a mega-corporation from seizing control of the world, but their actions risk unraveling the fabric of history.
